---
title: 'Executive Summary'
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
    toc: TRUE
---

# About This Page
A concise summary that highlights the key findings and policy recommendations. This section acts as a quick reference to the main outcomes.

# Key Findings
Summary of the principal conclusions drawn from the research.
